title: BLDP Q1 2023 and Q4 2023 Earnings Overview
text: Ballard Power Systems reported strong performance trends in 2023. The 2023 revenue forecast fell from US$117.3 million to US$101.9 million with EPS estimate unchanged at -US$0.512 per share. Ballard shipped 74 megawatts of product in 2023 including 540 fuel cell engines, growing revenues on a year-over-year basis by 25%. The Q4 2023 earnings conference call was held on March 11, 2024, covering full year 2023 results. Q4 2023 revenue reached $46.8 million, up 132% year-over-year. For the full year 2023, total megawatts and number of modules shipped increased by 17% and 37%, respectively, to 74 MW and 540 modules. The company expected limited initial deliveries of 177 fuel cell engines in 2023 from a major Solaris Bus & Coach order announced in October 2023, with the remainder to ship from 2024 through 2026. Strong order momentum in bus segment contrasted with challenges in other verticals, setting up transition into more challenging 2024 period.
